EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IScaleFormat

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to scale formatting options.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("AE9EDA31-A9F0-4687-B3A5-8C061C92D3EB")]
public interface IScaleFormat

Properties

AbbreviateUnits

Abbreviate the units in the scale string.

bool AbbreviateUnits { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

CapitolizeUnits

Capitolize the units in the scale string.

bool CapitolizeUnits { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

CustomFormat

A string defining the scale format. Embed XML tokens where scale values should go, i.e., <SCA a=''Attribute''>. Possible attributes: Scale, Separator, PageUnitValue, PageUnits, EqualsText, MapUnits.

string CustomFormat { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Equals

The text used for 'equals', i.e., ' = ' in 1 inch = 5 miles.

string Equals { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Format

Format used to display scale, i.e., 1:20000 or 1 inch equals 5 miles.

esriScaleFormat Format { get; set; }

Property Value

esriScaleFormat

Examples

Sample Snippet

MapUnits

The map units used to display a scale, i.e., the 'miles' in 1 inch = 5 miles.

esriUnits MapUnits { get; set; }

Property Value

esriUnits

Examples

Sample Snippet

NumberFormat

Format used to display scale value, i.e., 20,000.

INumberFormat NumberFormat { get; set; }

Property Value

INumberFormat

Examples

Sample Snippet

PageUnitValue

The number preceding the page units in a scale, i.e., the '1' in 1 inch = 5 miles.

double PageUnitValue { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

PageUnits

The page units used to display a scale, i.e., the 'inch' in 1 inch = 5 miles.

esriUnits PageUnits { get; set; }

Property Value

esriUnits

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReverseOrder

Reverse the standard order [1:1000] becomes [1000:1] and [1 in = 10 mi] becomes [10 mi = 1 in].

bool ReverseOrder { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Separator

Character(s) used to separate '1' from the scale in an absolute scale, i.e., the ':' in 1:20000.

string Separator { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Methods

CalcMapUnitValue(double)

Calculate the number of map units corresponding to the specified page units at the given absolute scale.

double CalcMapUnitValue(double absoluteScale)

Parameters

absoluteScale double

Returns

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

LoadFromRegistry()

Obtain the scale format to the system default.

void LoadFromRegistry()

Examples

Sample Snippet

SaveToRegistry()

Store the scale format as the system default.

void SaveToRegistry()

Examples

Sample Snippet

ScaleToString(double)

Convert the absolute scale to a string using the current IScaleFormat attributes.

string ScaleToString(double Scale)

Parameters

Scale double

Returns

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

StringToScale(string)

Convert the string to an absolute scale using the current IScaleFormat attributes.

double StringToScale(string scaleStr)

Parameters

scaleStr string

Returns

double

Examples

Sample Snippet
